transcription.text: from Florida a powerhouse of vitamin C Florida orange juice gives Barbara Ann Scott Olympic skating champion a real powerhouse of vitamin C and energy yes that's true I know I need vitamin C every day because I've been told the body just cannot store it and I like to get my vitamin C the way nature intended balanced with other health benefits in delicious canned orange juice from Florida you want your family to have the best the natural vitamin C the kind you get in canned orange juice from Florida and the canned way is the most convenient economical way to get it this 46 ounce can fills eight big glasses with pure full-strength orange juice canned in Florida it's your powerhouse of natural vitamin C from Florida
